payload.title: Cross-provider eval — GPT and Gemini on the same task suite
payload.description: Same five tasks (11-pipeline, 12-result-chain, 13-numeric, 14-imports, 15-many-points) and the run 002/004 harness, but with GPT-4 / Gemini agents. Hypothesis: vanilla ship rate drops for stronger models but the dialect still catches whatever bugs do ship. Needs API access to non-Anthropic providers.
